---
name: First Contribution
about: Scoped first-time contribution request with onboarding details
title: "[FIRST-CONTRIB] "
labels: "good first issue"
assignees: ""
---

## Outcome

What specific user-facing or operational outcome should this contribution produce?

## Context

Where is the relevant code/content? Link files or sections.

## Surface / Format

Which area does this touch? Examples: `_posts` Markdown/frontmatter, `docs` Markdown/YAML, `_layouts` Liquid/HTML, `assets` CSS, or `data` JSON.

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Concrete acceptance criteria are listed
- [ ] Required checks to run are listed (`bundle exec jekyll build --strict_front_matter --future`, repo tests, etc.)
- [ ] Scope fits a first contribution (<1 day focused work)

## Constraints

Any constraints (style, schema, governance, security) that must be respected.

## Verification

How should a reviewer verify this is complete?
